NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUIFactory
public interface
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUIFactory
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​UIFactory
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WinForms.​UIFactory
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​UIFactory

Universal interface for creating UI utilized by SparkleUpdater

Functions
CreateUpdateAvailableWindow
IUpdateAvailable CreateUpdateAvailableWindow(
List<AppCastItem> 
updates,
ISignatureVerifier? 
signatureVerifier,
string 
currentVersion
 = 
"",
string 
appName
 = 
"the application",
bool 
isUpdateAlreadyDownloaded
 = 
false
)

Create window for showing updates that are available along with change logs.

Parameters
updates
List<AppCastItem>

Sorted array of updates from latest to previous

signatureVerifier
ISignatureVerifier?

to verify release note signatures (if needed)

currentVersion
string

Version string for the currently running/available version of the application

appName
string

Name of the application

isUpdateAlreadyDownloaded
bool

If true, make sure UI text shows that the user is about to install the file instead of download it.

CreateProgressWindow
IDownloadProgress CreateProgressWindow(
string 
downloadTitle,
string 
actionButtonTitleAfterDownload
)

Create the window that shows the download progress to the user. Also allows users to cancel download and/or install the downloaded update.

Parameters
downloadTitle
string

Title shown at top of download window.  Typically something like "Downloading " + your application name + the version of your application

actionButtonTitleAfterDownload
string

Button text for after download is finished.  If the software will be rebooted after install, set to something like "Install and Relaunch".  Otherwise, "Install" works fine.

ShowCheckingForUpdates
ICheckingForUpdates ShowCheckingForUpdates()

Inform user in some way that NetSparkle is checking for updates

ShowUnknownInstallerFormatMessage
void ShowUnknownInstallerFormatMessage(
string 
downloadFileName
)

Show user a message saying downloaded update format is unknown

Parameter
downloadFileName
string

file name for the download

ShowVersionIsUpToDate
void ShowVersionIsUpToDate()

Show user that current installed version is up-to-date

ShowVersionIsSkippedByUserRequest
void ShowVersionIsSkippedByUserRequest()

Show message that latest update was skipped by user

ShowCannotDownloadAppcast
void ShowCannotDownloadAppcast(
string? 
appcastUrl
)

Show message that appcast is not available

Parameter
appcastUrl
string?

The URL to the app cast file

CanShowToastMessages
bool CanShowToastMessages()

See if this UIFactory can show toast messages

Returns

true if the UIFactory can show for toast messages; false otherwise

ShowToast
void ShowToast(
Action 
clickHandler
)

Show 'toast' window to notify new version is available (e.g. in bottom right corner of screen)

Parameter
clickHandler
Action

Click handler to call when the user clicks the toast window (the core library uses this to show the update available window when clicked). Make sure to call this handler when the user clicks on your window if you want them to be able to pull up the update available window to download and install the update.

ShowDownloadErrorMessage
void ShowDownloadErrorMessage(
string 
message,
string? 
appcastUrl
)

Show message on download error

Parameters
message
string

Error message from exception

appcastUrl
string?

the URL for the appcast file

Shutdown
void Shutdown()

Shut down the UI so we can run an update.  If in WPF, System.Windows.Application.Current.Shutdown().  If in WinForms, Application.Exit().  If in Avalonia, shuts down the current application lifetime like this or similar: (Application.Current?.ApplicationLifetime as IClassicDesktopStyleApplicationLifetime)?.Shutdown();

Properties
HideReleaseNotes
bool HideReleaseNotes {
get;
set
}

Hides the release notes view when an update is found.

HideSkipButton
bool HideSkipButton {
get;
set
}

Hides the skip this update button when an update is found.

HideRemindMeLaterButton
bool HideRemindMeLaterButton {
get;
set
}

Hides the remind me later button when an update is found.

ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate
string? ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate {
get;
set
}

The HTML template to use for each changelog, version, etc. for every app cast item update. If you set this to "" or null, the default ReleaseNotesGrabber will use the default template.  To work properly, you MUST have 4 placeholders in the template ({0}, {1}, {2}, {3}), as this will be used in a string.Format() call.  The only exception to this would be if you implement your own ReleaseNotesGrabber subclass that overrides ReleaseNotesGrabber.DownloadAllReleaseNotes(List{AppCastItem}, AppCastItem, System.Threading.CancellationToken).

{0} = app cast item title (incl. version); {1} = app cast publication date; {2} = the actual release notes; {3} = the background color for the release notes header.

AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML
string? AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML {
get;
set
}

Any additional header information to stick in the HTML head element that will show up in the release notes (e.g. styles, etc.).  Must be HTML formatted to work properly.  Can be null or "".
